questions.question: Which is the most popular JavaScript framework?
What's the fundamental building block of React apps?
What's the name of the syntax we use to describe the UI in React components?
How does data flow naturally in a React app?
How to pass data into a child component?
When does React re-render a component?
options: Whenever the component's props or state change

questions.question: Which hook is used to manage state in a functional component?
What does the useEffect hook do?
options: Syncs a component with an external system or side effect

questions.question: What is the correct way to update state in React?
options: Use the setState function returned by useState
Use document.querySelector to modify the DOM

questions.question: What is the purpose of React's key prop when rendering lists?
options: It improves the styling of list items
It helps React identify which items have changed
It is required for all JSX elements

questions.question: Which hook would you use to access a DOM element directly?
What does the useReducer hook return?
options: A state value and a dispatch function

questions.question: What is the purpose of React Context?
options: To share state across components without prop drilling

questions.question: What is a React fragment used for?
options: To add CSS styles to components
To group multiple elements without adding an extra DOM node
